steps.title: Identify the dependency
steps.content: The passage says the way elements are balanced affects how viewers perceive a photograph. Since balance shapes what the photograph conveys, the blank needs a phrase showing dependence on how the image is balanced.

steps.title: Reject the wrong relations
steps.content: A would mean balance prevents what the photograph conveys. C would mean the photograph is obligated to its balance. D would mean what it conveys is reserved for balance. None expresses dependence. The answer is B.
